behavior_summary: When the player examines this object/NPC, the script displays a single short descriptive line: "statue of Mordea ".
The routine acts as a U8P_MORDSTAT::look/inspection handler (process type 0x0208) and then suspends/ends the process, returning control to the engine.
No branching, menus, flag reads/writes, or external calls are present — behavior is purely descriptive.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MORDSTAT::look executes on a U8P_MORDSTAT::look/inspect event, emits a single bark, then suspends/terminates the process.
There are no conditional branches or alternative execution paths.

main_function.name: U8P_MORDSTAT::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown to the player when they 'U8P_MORDSTAT::look at' this object/NPC (statue of Mordea).
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine's U8P_MORDSTAT::look/examine action for this object (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_MORDSTAT::look
function_map.role: Look/inspect handler that displays a single descriptive bark and ends the process.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When the player examines this object/NPC, the script displays a single short descriptive line: "statue of Mordea ".
